title: puccinellia distans f. ambigua
intro: Puccinellia distans f. ambigua, also known as saltwort grass, is a type of plant that belongs to the family Poaceae. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The plant is said to have various health benefits, such as reducing swelling and pain, and it has been used to treat conditions like arthritis and wounds. In terms of herbal preparations, Puccinellia distans f. ambigua can be made into infusions, decoctions, or tinctures to utilize its medicinal properties.
